notes.architecture: Each view composes finBlocks into complete dashboard layouts. Views are mapped to user questions via keyword matching for fast intent detection. Views specify required MCP calls for parallel data fetching.
notes.userTiers: Views support multiple subscription tiers: free (basic portfolio/stock views), pro (intermediate analysis), premium (advanced/professional tools)
notes.performance: Template path target: 15 seconds total (1-2s classifier, 0ms template load, 3-5s parallel MCP, 1-2s render)
notes.fallback: Views not matching any template fall back to intelligent UI Planner LLM path for novel questions
notes.scalability: 100+ views can be generated from 100 finBlocks through composition and parametrization, avoiding code explosion
